evals.name: cross-doc-comparison
evals.prompt: Comparing findings in documentation: What is the difference between the 'Layered Memory' architecture and standard Vector Retrieval according to the internal design documents? Provide specific details and citations.
evals.expected_output: A detailed comparison citing specific sections of the internal memory design documents.

assertions.name: uses_citations
assertions.description: Must include citations [1], [2] corresponding to the source list.

assertions.name: no_hallucination
assertions.description: Facts must strictly come from the retrieved context, not general knowledge.

evals.name: ambiguous-query-handling
evals.prompt: Find documents about 'its' core developer. (Context: The last topic was HiveMind)
evals.expected_output: The agent should disambiguate 'its' to 'HiveMind' via the analyze script and find the correct info.

assertions.name: query_disambiguation
assertions.description: The expanded queries should contain 'HiveMind developer' or similar.
